Class UserDAO

java.lang.Object
IPOS_Detailed_Design.dao.UserDAO
public class UserDAO extends Object
UserDAO — handles all database operations for the Users table. This replaces the in-memory List in AccountService with real MySQL calls. The method names match what AccountService already uses so swapping is easy.

  • Constructor Details

    • UserDAO

      public UserDAO()

  • Method Details

    • createUser

      public int createUser(User user)
      Insert a new user into the Users table. Returns the generated UserID, or -1 if it failed.

    • getUserById

      public User getUserById(int userId)
      Get a user by their UserID. Matches AccountService.getUserById(int userId).

    • getUserByUsername

      public User getUserByUsername(String username)
      Get a user by their username. Matches AccountService.getUserByUsername(String username).

    • authenticateUser

      public User authenticateUser(String username, String password)
      Authenticate a user — returns the User object if credentials match, null if not. Replaces the loop in AccountService.authenticateUser().

    • getAllUsers

      public List<User> getAllUsers()
      Get all users. Matches AccountService.getAllUsers().

    • getAllMerchants

      public List<User> getAllMerchants()
      Get all merchants only. Matches AccountService.getAllMerchants().

    • updateMerchantDetails

      public boolean updateMerchantDetails(int merchantId, String contactName, String address, String phone)

    • searchMerchants

      public List<User> searchMerchants(String keyword)
      Search merchants by name, account number, contact name, or username. Powers the search bar in the Dashboard — worth 5 marks on the marking sheet.

    • getTotalUserCount

      public int getTotalUserCount()
      Count total number of users — for the dashboard home panel totalUsers label.

    • getOutstandingBalance

      public BigDecimal getOutstandingBalance(int merchantId)
      Get outstanding balance for a merchant. Matches AccountService.getOutstandingBalance(int merchantId).

    • suspendMerchant

      public boolean suspendMerchant(int merchantId)
      UC-SA-ACC-05a: Suspend merchant (15-30 days overdue).

    • markMerchantInDefault

      public boolean markMerchantInDefault(int merchantId)
      UC-SA-ACC-05b: Flag as in default (>30 days overdue).

    • restoreMerchantToNormal

      public boolean restoreMerchantToNormal(int merchantId)
      UC-SA-ACC-05c: Restore suspended account to normal after payment.

    • setAccountStatus

      public boolean setAccountStatus(int merchantId, AccountStatus status)
      UC-SA-ACC-05d: Manual status change by Director of Operations.

    • updateOutstandingBalance

      public boolean updateOutstandingBalance(int merchantId, BigDecimal newBalance)
      Update outstanding balance. Matches AccountService.updateOutstandingBalance().

    • increaseBalance

      public boolean increaseBalance(int merchantId, BigDecimal amount)
      Add to balance when order is placed.

    • reduceBalance

      public boolean reduceBalance(int merchantId, BigDecimal amount)
      Reduce balance when payment recorded. Cannot go below zero.

    • updateCreditLimit

      public boolean updateCreditLimit(int merchantId, BigDecimal newLimit)

    • updateDiscountPlan

      public boolean updateDiscountPlan(int merchantId, DiscountPlanType plan, String rate)

    • deleteMerchant

      public boolean deleteMerchant(int merchantId)
      Delete a merchant. Their orders/invoices/payments cascade delete if you add ON DELETE CASCADE to the schema foreign keys.
